title: タイシンと安らぎの時間

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay, time for a different angle...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You again? If you think I'm gonna play with you
like last time—think again!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Fine. C'mere. I'll pet you, but just a little.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I wish everyone in the world was as chill as you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Then they wouldn't say stupid things about me or
look down on me, and I could just live the way I...

Narita Taishin has loads of fun taking pictures
while playing with a cat. But she completely
forgets about training...
